result.stdout:
A collection runner for Nightingale collection files.

Usage: nightingale [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  run           

Run 'nightingale [command] --help' for more information about a command.

A collection runner for Nightingale collection files.

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  run

result.stdout:
Usage: nightingale run [options] <collection>

Arguments:
  collection    Path to Nightingale collection file (e.g. a .ncf file).

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information
